pred_reason: The contract violates Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern in multiple functions (SWC-107) and contains arithmetic operations vulnerable to overflow without proper safeguards (SWC-101). These issues are repeatedly identified across stake/unstake functions and bonus calculations. Evidence: External call in stakeNFT occurs after state updates, violating CEI pattern; getBonusValue calculation uses unprotected arithmetic with potential overflow; Multiple functions making external calls lack reentrancy guards
